about.description: AI/GenAI Developer with a strong Full Stack foundation — building agentic AI systems using LangGraph, LangChain, RAG pipelines, and LLM APIs alongside a MERN stack background. With 1+ year of professional experience, I've shipped production applications across healthcare, retail, and business management domains. Currently building DocuMind, a multi-agent LangGraph platform for multilingual legal document intelligence, as my MCA capstone project. Pursuing my MCA from DAVV, Indore while deepening my AI engineering skills through hands-on projects in LangGraph, RAG, NLP, and FastAPI.

ai_genai: Prompt Engineering (Zero-Shot, Few-Shot, CoT, ReAct, ToT)
ai_ml_concepts: ML Fundamentals (Supervised Learning, Model Evaluation, Feature Engineering)

experience.description: Engineered a scalable EMR web application (Robosensy) using the MERN stack, improving API response time by 30% through query optimization and efficient schema design. Automated a legacy MongoDB database migration using Python scripts, restructuring data across 10+ collections to align with updated schemas. Built and deployed a cross-platform Gym Management system (Web + React Native), and managed deployments on AWS EC2 with Docker and CI/CD pipelines.
Improved UI/UX for key modules, reducing page load time by 25%. Increased user engagement by 20%. Collaborated with design and backend teams to accelerate delivery by 15%.

projects.name: DocuMind
projects.description: A multi-agent document intelligence platform built with LangGraph — featuring 6 specialized agents (extraction, classification, summarization, risk, QA, routing) for automated processing of Hindi/English/Hinglish legal documents. Built a hybrid RAG pipeline (ChromaDB + BM25) achieving ~85% retrieval accuracy on 50+ page multilingual legal corpora with sub-2s query latency. Engineered a regex + LLM-based NER extraction pipeline for structured parsing of legal entities (parties, dates, obligations, penalty clauses). Delivered as a full-stack platform with an async FastAPI backend and a Next.js frontend featuring real-time streamed LLM output. Built as MCA capstone project.

projects.name: WarrantyDesk
projects.description: A full-stack Sales & Warranty Management SaaS, adopted by 50+ shop owners across India, each managing 1000+ customer records with real-time tracking. Features automated warranty expiry alerts, invoice generation, and role-based dashboards (Admin/Staff) backed by scalable REST APIs and Redux Toolkit state management.

projects.name: Resume Parse Tool
projects.description: A production-ready resume parser UI integrating backend APIs for real-time structured data extraction from unstructured resume files. Built as a freelance project with clean, maintainable, scalable component architecture under tight deadlines.

projects.name: Inventory Management System
projects.description: A comprehensive inventory management application built using the Next.js stack. Features include role-based access control, real-time inventory updates, and detailed analytics dashboard for administrators.

projects.name: Share-Prompt
projects.description: A modern AI prompt-sharing platform built with Next.js featuring secure authentication via NextAuth. Users can create, explore, save, and share AI prompts with a clean, intuitive interface and real-time updates.

projects.name: Travel-Buddy
projects.description: A comprehensive travel web application featuring real-time geolocation services, trip sharing capabilities, and secure JWT-based authentication with Google One Tap Login integration for seamless user experience.

projects.name: Doc-Connect
projects.description: A modern doctor appointment booking system with comprehensive doctor listings, streamlined booking flow, patient management, and integrated Strapi CMS for efficient content management and administration.

projects.name: Task Management App
projects.description: A collaborative task management tool with real-time updates, team collaboration features, project tracking, deadline management, and intuitive drag-and-drop interface for enhanced productivity.

projects.name: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A responsive personal portfolio website built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Showcases skills, projects, and resume with interactive animations and dark mode support.

achievements.title: MCA Capstone Selection
achievements.description: DocuMind selected as final-year capstone project — building a production-grade multi-agent AI system with LangGraph for multilingual legal document intelligence.

achievements.title: MERN Stack Full-Stack Development Certification
achievements.description: Completed an intensive hands-on program from Coding Shuttle focusing on real-world MERN applications.

achievements.title: Team Lead - E-Governance Internship
achievements.description: Led a 4-member team and delivered core MERN stack modules contributing to digitization of public service workflows.
